name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: 6.8-inch QHD+ Dynamic AMOLED display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 200MP camera, 5000mAh battery, S Pen included. The ultimate Android flagship experience.

name: Apple MacBook Air M2
description: 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display, Apple M2 chip, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD, 18-hour battery life. Ultra-thin and lightweight design for professionals.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, crystal clear hands-free calling. Premium over-ear wireless headphones.

name: LG 55-inch 4K OLED TV
description: 55-inch OLED evo panel, 4K resolution, 120Hz refresh rate, Dolby Vision & Atmos, WebOS smart TV, Google Assistant & Alexa built-in.

name: Canon EOS R50 Mirrorless Camera
description: 24.2MP APS-C CMOS sensor, DIGIC X processor, 4K video recording, dual pixel autofocus, Wi-Fi & Bluetooth. Perfect for content creators and photography enthusiasts.

name: OnePlus Nord CE 3 Lite
description: 6.72-inch FHD+ 120Hz display, Snapdragon 695, 108MP triple camera, 5000mAh battery with 67W SUPERVOOC charging. Best mid-range smartphone under 20K.

name: boAt Airdopes 141 TWS Earbuds
description: 42H total playback, BEAST Mode for low latency gaming, ENx tech for clear calls, IPX4 water resistance, instant voice assistant access.

name: HP LaserJet MFP M140w Printer
description: Wireless monochrome laser printer with print, scan and copy functions. Wi-Fi & USB connectivity, 20 ppm print speed, 150-sheet input tray.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: 8000 DPI sensor, MagSpeed electromagnetic scrolling, ergonomic design, Bluetooth & USB receiver, works on glass surfaces. Rechargeable via USB-C.

name: Levi's 511 Slim Fit Jeans
description: Classic slim fit jeans crafted from premium stretch denim. Features a mid-rise waist, tapered leg, and 5-pocket styling. Available in dark indigo wash.

name: Nike Air Max 270 Sneakers
description: Lightweight mesh upper, Max Air unit in the heel for all-day comfort, foam midsole for cushioning. Iconic street-style sneakers for everyday wear.

name: Allen Solly Formal Shirt
description: Premium cotton blend formal shirt with a slim fit cut, spread collar, and single cuff. Wrinkle-resistant fabric suitable for office and formal occasions.

name: Biba Women's Anarkali Kurta
description: Beautiful flared Anarkali style kurta made from soft cotton fabric with intricate embroidery on the yoke. Perfect for festivals and casual occasions.

name: Fossil Analog Wrist Watch
description: Stainless steel case with mineral glass lens, genuine leather strap, water resistant up to 30m. Sleek minimalist design for everyday casual wear.

name: Peter England Men's Chinos
description: Slim fit cotton stretch chinos with mid-rise waist and flat front design. Versatile smart-casual trousers available in beige, olive and navy.

name: Adidas Ultraboost 22 Running Shoes
description: Boost midsole for energy return, Primeknit+ upper for adaptive fit, Continental rubber outsole for grip. Ideal for long distance running and daily training.

name: Wildcraft Unisex Backpack 30L
description: Water-resistant 30L daypack with padded laptop compartment, multiple organizer pockets, ergonomic shoulder straps and sternum strap. Ideal for trekking and college.

name: Philips Air Fryer HD9200
description: 4.1-litre capacity, Rapid Air technology, up to 90% less fat, 7 preset cooking programs, non-stick dishwasher-safe basket. Healthy cooking made easy.

name: Prestige Induction Cooktop
description: 2000W induction cooktop with 7 preset menus, touch panel controls, auto voltage regulator, and child safety lock. Scratch-resistant glass top surface.

name: Milton Thermosteel Flask 1L
description: Double-walled vacuum insulated stainless steel flask. Keeps beverages hot for 24 hours and cold for 48 hours. Leak-proof lid with easy pour spout.

name: Wonderchef Granite Cookware Set
description: 5-piece granite coated non-stick cookware set including fry pan, kadai, saucepan, and lids. Induction compatible, PFOA-free coating, heat-resistant handles.

name: Pigeon by Stovekraft Pressure Cooker 5L
description: 5-litre aluminium pressure cooker with outer lid, safety valve and gasket. ISI certified, induction and gas compatible, ideal for everyday Indian cooking.

name: Bajaj Rex 500W Mixer Grinder
description: 500W motor with 3 stainless steel jars — liquidizing, wet grinding and chutney. Overload protector, anti-skid feet, 2-year warranty. Ideal for daily kitchen tasks.

name: Amazon Basics Microwave Oven 23L
description: 23-litre solo microwave with 800W power, 8 preset cooking modes, defrost function, child lock and express cooking. Stylish black finish with LED display.

name: Lakme Absolute Skin Natural Mousse
description: Lightweight mousse foundation with SPF 8, provides medium to full coverage, matte finish, lasts up to 16 hours. Available in 8 Indian skin tone shades.

name: Himalaya Herbals Face Wash
description: Pack of 3 neem face washes — purifying neem, moisturizing aloe vera, and brightening turmeric. Gentle formula suitable for all skin types. 150ml each.

name: Philips BT3231 Beard Trimmer
description: 11 length settings (0.5mm to 10mm), DuraPower technology for 200 min runtime, corded and cordless use, self-sharpening rounded tip blades. Washable attachment.

name: Biotique Bio Morning Nector Moisturizer
description: Lightweight SPF 30 sunscreen moisturizer with honey, wheat germ and berberry extracts. Keeps skin soft, supple and hydrated all day. Suitable for all skin types.

name: Maybelline Fit Me Concealer
description: Blendable liquid concealer that covers dark circles, blemishes and spots. Natural matte finish, dermatologist tested, available in 10 shades for Indian skin tones.

name: WOW Skin Science Hair Oil
description: Onion black seed hair oil blend with red onion seed extract, black seed oil and coconut oil. Reduces hair fall, strengthens roots, adds shine. 200ml bottle.

name: Nivea Men Face Wash Dark Spot
description: 10x whitening face wash with vitamin C and multi-vitamin complex. Removes dark spots, controls oil, deep cleanses pores. Suitable for daily use. 100ml.

name: Colorbar Cosmetics Lip Color
description: Rich creamy matte lipstick with long-lasting formula. Enriched with vitamin E and jojoba oil for moisturized lips. Available in 30 vibrant shades.

name: Braun Silk Epil 3 Epilator
description: 20 tweezers for efficient hair removal, massaging rollers to stimulate skin, close-grip technology. Corded use, works on all body areas including sensitive skin.

name: Boldfit Yoga Mat with Carry Strap
description: 6mm thick anti-slip TPE yoga mat, 183cm x 61cm dimensions, eco-friendly material, moisture resistant, includes free carry strap. Available in 6 colors.

name: Cosco Dumbbell Set 10kg
description: Pair of 5kg rubber coated hex dumbbells with ergonomic anti-slip grip handle. Rust-proof coating, flat edges to prevent rolling. Ideal for home workouts.

name: Nivia Storm Football Size 5
description: FIFA approved hand-stitched football with 32-panel design, butyl bladder for superior air retention, PU outer casing for durability. Suitable for all surfaces.

name: Strauss Adjustable Skipping Rope
description: Adjustable length PVC skipping rope with ball bearing handles for smooth rotation. Anti-slip grip, suitable for all fitness levels. Length adjustable up to 9.5 feet.

name: Decathlon Kipsta Basketball
description: Size 7 rubber basketball with grip channels for better control, suitable for indoor and outdoor courts. Durable butyl bladder for excellent air retention.

name: Aurion Treadmill AT-1105
description: 2.5 HP peak DC motor, 12 preset programs, max speed 12 km/h, foldable design, LED display showing speed, distance, time and calories. Max user weight 100kg.

name: Yonex Mavis 350 Badminton Set
description: Set includes 2 Yonex Arcsaber rackets and 6 Mavis 350 nylon shuttlecocks. Lightweight graphite frame, full cover included. Ideal for recreational players.

name: MuscleBlaze Whey Protein 1kg
description: 25g protein per serving, 5.5g BCAAs, 4g glutamic acid, low sugar, informed choice certified. Available in rich chocolate and cookies & cream flavors.
